bought_copy_item_info:
The program has been stopped due to a duplicate item being purchased. Please read the instructions carefully.  
 1: Send the duplicate item to the transfer list  
 2: Add the similar player from the club to the manual slot  
 3: Re run the sbc  
 
 OR Allow the use of players from the club
ignored_feature: You cannot use this feature with your current subscription.
name: Name
feature_auto_bid_warning1: The settings below are the actions to be applied sequentially to the won items.
feature_auto_bid_warning2: The auto-bid feature makes offers to a maximum of 20 players each time it runs.
feature_auto_bid_warning3: After the auto-bid feature completes its task, it is recommended to wait 5 minutes before running it again for optimal performance.
feature_auto_bid_warning4: Running the auto-bid feature repeatedly without waiting may lead to certain restrictions.

auto_bid_validation_msg: Make sure you enter your filters correctly, max. bid value should not be missing and select at least 1 of the other filters.

selected_pack_no_fp: Selected pack, can not buy by using FP
no_fp_left: There is no fp for this action, Turn Off Buy Pack By Using FP Feature
startup_desc: When you log in to the program, add the features you want to be opened AUTOMATIC immediately by clicking the + button and save them.
duplicate_startup: Do not select the same feature more than once
squat_price_update_success: Successfully Copied Players from Futwiz  in #.Try
pieces_futbin_squad_will_update: pieces SBC price will be updated
futbin_error_solution3: 3: As a last resort, you can contact us on our live support line and ask us to do this.
futbin_error_solution2: 2: Enter our website from your mobile phone, click on the SBC menu, you will see our entire SBC list, you can try to update the price from here using your phone's cellular internet.
futbin_error_solution1: 1: Enter Companion in the Opera browser, log in to the program, just when SBC is about to update the price, activate the free VPN belonging to Opera and update the SBC price. If the process is successful, close the VPN immediately.
futbin_copy_error_solution_desc: If you do not receive a squad update, please contact us.

sbc_should_update_first: The update time for SBC Player prices should not exceed 1 hour. Please click on the round update icon to the right of the SBC name or double-click on the SBC name and enter it, download your squad from futbin again and save it. Then you can solve the SBC.
close_msg_window: After closing the message window on the screen, try to start the process again.
compare_price_failed_long_duration:
Click on price comparison. However, for 10 Seconds, prices from EA servers did not appear on the screen. Operations Suspended Due to Low Internet Connection! 
  This may be due to instantaneous internet connection weakness, you can try to start the processes again.
